branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Structural / loop-class closure repository default fallback

title: MD-47..50 audit: 4 internal-paper claim verification

MD_47.integration_status: PROVEN-NOT-YET-INTEGRATED in external papers; structurally clean derivation under System-R (theta_SN = pi*gamma/2 is a Lemma-8 cosmological-density Sektor-Topologie-Faktor 1/2) but not currently exposed as an external observable in P1-P5 / P4-A..D.

MD_48.integration_status: PROVEN-INTERNAL: identification K_Omega^min = alpha_xi + lambda = N_gen/5 = 3/5 are clean structural identities matching the pipeline measurements at ~0.1% precision. Result pertains to the framework's internal microkernel persistence theorem (Beweissammlung 04 internal paper); not directly an external observable, hence not in P1-P5.

MD_49.delta_3_observables_P3_extension: P3 closure table has 29 observables = 26 core + 3 extension rows O27=Lambda_t, O28=Lambda_s, O29=Y_p. MD-49's 26-cardinality refers to the Beweissammlung core registry; P3 manuscript adds the three extension rows separately.
MD_49.integration_status: PROVEN-AND-INTEGRATED: P3 manuscript (loop-class-closure-repro) reports 29 cross-sector observables, with the 26-row core explicitly distinguished from the 3-row Lambda_munu + Y_p extension; figure 3 caption documents the dual-state nature.

MD_50.structural_parallel: theta_em = pi from EMT-04b Quellaxiom (full pi-rotation in chirality-restricted subspace); theta_SN = pi * gamma/2 from the Sektor-Topologie-Faktor 1/2 of the Cosmological-Density class (Lemma 8) plus chirality-half-restriction to Time-Forward subgroup. The two angles differ by the structural ratio gamma/2 = 1/20.
MD_50.integration_status: PROVEN-NOT-YET-INTEGRATED in external papers; the strict-form theorem is in Beweissammlung 04 internal paper §16d.9 but does not appear as a load-bearing claim in P1-P5 since the SN-distance observable is not currently in the external closure registry.

verdict: All four MD-47..50 claims are NUMERICALLY CONSISTENT with the System-R coefficient algebra. MD-49 is integrated externally (P3 26+3 = 29 observables, with extension explicitly distinguished). MD-47, MD-48, MD-50 are proven internal-paper results without current external-paper exposure (the underlying observables — F_healthy SN seed, K_Omega microkernel, theta_SN topological angle — are not in the external closure registry of P1-P5/P4-A..D). They remain structurally clean and ready for external promotion if needed.
